The key question investors are debating is whether hyperscalers, particularly the largest AI infrastructure buyers, are beginning to accumulate excess compute capacity. If some AI infrastructure is no longer fully utilized and starts being resold or leased to third parties, pricing power for GPUs and memory could moderate.
